name: Hindsight Memory MCP Server
description: Hindsight memory recall, retain, and reflect MCP server

config_schema.label: Hindsight Service URL
config_schema.description: Base URL for the hindsight memory service

config_schema.label: Recall Limit
config_schema.description: Maximum number of results returned by recall

config_schema.label: Recall Budget
config_schema.description: Recall budget level: low (fast), mid, high (thorough)

config_schema.label: Default Tags
config_schema.description: Comma-separated tags to filter by default

config_schema.label: Tag Match Mode
config_schema.description: Tag matching mode: any, all, any_strict, all_strict

config_schema.label: Default Fact Types
config_schema.description: Comma-separated fact types to filter by default

config_schema.label: HTTP Timeout (seconds)
config_schema.description: Timeout in seconds for hindsight HTTP requests
